assessment_objectives.objective: the circumstances requiring baseline configuration review / update are defined.
the baseline configuration of the system is reviewed / updated when required due to organization-defined circumstances.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and when a significant change occurs

assessment_objectives.objective: the frequency of baseline configuration review / update is defined.
the baseline configuration of the system is reviewed per an organization-defined frequency.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and when a significant change occurs

assessment_objectives.objective: the baseline configuration of the system is updated per an organization-defined frequency.
the baseline configuration of the system is reviewed when system components are installed or modified.
the baseline configuration of the system is updated when system components are installed or modified.
the system is reviewed <A.03.04.06.ODP[06]: frequency> to identify unnecessary or nonsecure functions, ports, protocols, connections, and services.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least every 12 months, when any system functions, ports, protocols, or services changes are made, and after any significant incidents or significant changes to risks

assessment_objectives.objective: the baseline configuration of the system is reviewed <A.03.04.01.ODP[01]: frequency>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least every 12 months and after any significant incidents or significant changes occur

assessment_objectives.objective: the baseline configuration of the system is updated <A.03.04.01.ODP[01]: frequency>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least every 12 months and after any significant incidents or significant changes occur
